step1.title: Your personal calorie tracker
step1.subtitle: Understand your body. Reach your goals.
step1.value1: Personal calorie goals based on your body
step1.value2: Track your weight and energy balance over time
step1.value3: Easy to log – in under 30 seconds

tour.title: Explore the app
tour.subtitle: Here's what you can do in CalculEat.

oversikt.title: Overview
oversikt.desc: See your daily log, track your weight history and monitor your energy balance day by day.

planering.title: Planning
planering.desc: Manage your food items, create recipes and save favourite meals for quick logging.

minplan.title: My Plan
minplan.desc: Calculate your calorie needs, set goals and analyse your body composition.

social.title: Social
social.desc: Add friends, share food items and follow each other's progress.

step2.title: What's your goal?
step2.subtitle: We'll tailor your plan to what you want to achieve.

step3.title: Tell us about yourself
step3.subtitle: So we can calculate your personal calorie needs.
step3.heightHint: Enter a value between 100 and 250 cm
step3.weightHint: Enter a value between 20 and 400 kg

step4.title: You're all set!
step4.tdeeSubtext: We'll refine this when you choose your activity level
step4.closing: Complete your profile to get your exact calorie needs and personal goals.
